MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE
Phil Kilduff, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff and Moving party: Liquidation Property, Inc.

Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Mar-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. ELIZABETH A. MACDONALD, TEL. NO. 922-5939 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - ATTY. MACDONALD REPORTED TO THE COURT THAT THE PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY IS ILL AND ASKING FOR A CONTINUANCE BUT THERE THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE OR NOTICE GIVEN TO THE DEFENDANT. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT MARVIN RAMIREZ Motion To Quash Service Of Summons IS GRANTED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/AL
